text.title: choreography-vs-orchestration-decision Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "co-checkout-2026-05-23", "owner": "@ruslan", "decision": "orchestration via temporal workflow 'checkout-saga'", "rationale": "checkout-saga has 7 steps with compensations; choreography would spread debug ownership across 5 teams; SLO for retry recovery is 5 min; both inputs cited inline", "inputs_used": [ "docs/checkout-workflow.md", "docs/service-map.md" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "pattern": "orchestration", "workflow": "checkout-saga" }

example.note: owner='team'; pattern not in enum; workflow empty; rationale defensive without citations.

section.title: Forbidden
section.forbidden: pattern = 'either' or vague — must be choreography xor orchestration.
ADR covering more than one workflow.
